description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Operator Hot Wallet is a hot wallet controlled by a bot that will update stUSDS parameters on an automated basis as specified in [A.4.4.1.3.8.3.2.3 - Automatic Updates By Operator Hot Wallet](a6e1735f-bd82-4ab6-982b-218013c3455f). The wallet is controlled by Ecosystem Actor TechOps Services under the supervision of Core

in consultation with the Core Council Risk Advisor. The addition of the Hot Wallet as an Operator of the stUSDS BEAM is authorized to proceed directly to an Executive Vote without a prior Governance Poll.
The Operator Hot Wallet is a hot wallet controlled by a bot that will update stUSDS parameters on an automated basis as specified in [A.4.4.1.3.8

.3 - Automatic Updates By Operator Hot Wallet](a6e1735f-bd82-4ab6-982b-218013c3455f). The wallet is controlled by Ecosystem Actor TechOps Services under the supervision of Core GovOps in consultation with the Core Council Risk Advisor. The addition of the Hot Wallet as an Operator of the stUSDS BEAM is authorized to proceed directly to an Executive Vote without a prior Governance Poll.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
